news_references: Penang launches first generative AI chatbot for MBPP services (Free Malaysia Today)
AI in Malaysian workplaces: A strategic outlook (People Matters Global)
email_subject: Chatbot jimat 20 jam/minggu untuk SME Malaysia! 🤖
email_body_html:
Chatbot jimat 20 jam/minggu untuk SME Malaysia! 🤖

Dear SME Owner,

Baru-baru ini, Pulau Pinang dah lancar AI chatbot untuk MBPP services — proof yang AI automation dah jadi keutamaan di Malaysia!

For tourism & property SMEs, our AI chatbot solutions can:

  • Auto-reply booking inquiries 24/7 via WhatsApp (platform nombor 1 di Malaysia!)
  • Handle PDPA-compliant customer data securely (fully aligned with Malaysia's PDPA 2010)
  • Save you 20+ hours/week on routine FAQs (property viewing schedules, tour package queries)
  • Support Bahasa Malaysia, English, Chinese — semua customer cover!

Local examples: Hartamas Real Estate dah guna chatbot untuk auto-reply REN inquiries, tourist agencies kat Langkawi guna untuk booking confirmations.

Book Free Demo Sekarang

Reach us via WhatsApp: +6012-345 6789

PDPA Compliance Note: All customer data processed via our chatbot is fully compliant with Malaysia's Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA) 2010.

Regards,
Microark AI Team
microarktech.com
